calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Tokyo Katana-Ya LLC, a limited liability company, and Rolando Bucago, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Nicole Rodich, CSR #11604. Telephone: 415-551-5869. Email: nrodich@sftc.org.

David Brand, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Wise Funding Group, LLC.
Richard Muller, Collections Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Brand and Muller appeared for this morning's proceedings via CourtCall.
No appearance by defendants Tokyo Katana-Ya LLC, a limited liability company, and Rolando Bucago, an individual.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on June 22, 2018, and personally served on defendant Tokyo Katana-Ya LLC's Registered Agent of Process on August 15, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Rolando Bucago, an individual, occurred on February 7, 2019 and effectuated on February 17, 2019.
Default as to defendant Tokyo Katana-Ya LLC, a limited liability company, was entered on October 25, 2018.
Default as to defendants Tokyo Katana-Ya LLC, a limited liability company, and Roland Bucago, an individual, was entered on June 24, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on June 24, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Wise Funding Group, LLC, and against the defaulted defendants Tokyo Katana-Ya LLC, a limited liability company, and Rolando Bucago, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $34,675.00. ($39,675.00 Pled in Complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - $4,645.50.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $778.00.

Total - $42,923.50.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
